name: Plunder Flechten
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Candied fruit; diced and floured with Cinnamon sugar
recipeInstructions: Prepare the Plunderteig recipe and refrigerate. Take one-third of the chilled dough and roll it out to a thickness of 1/4 inch. Brush the dough with beaten egg. Cover it with the prepared candied fruit and sprinkle cinnamon sugar evenly over it. Fold the dough in half and roll it out to a thickness of 1/2 inch. Cut the filled dough into strips measuring 3/4 inch by 8 inches. Open each strip down the center using a pastry wheel, leaving one inch unopened at each end. Twist the strips into various designs of single or double rounds. Place the twists on a greased baking sheet, brush them with beaten egg, and allow them to rise in a warm place covered until they have doubled in size, approximately 1 1/2 hours. Bake in an oven set to moderate heat at 350°F for 20 minutes or until golden brown. Brush the hot twists with apricot preserves.
